title: TestManifest
description: Stage 1 (test authoring) output: fail-first tests per correction finding, with captured evidence that each test fails for the right reason (DESIGN.md Stage 1).

fail_evidence.description: Captured output showing the test failing for the asserted defect — not a compile error, missing fixture, or unrelated panic. For completion/improvement findings this records the observable acceptance criterion instead.

could_not_reproduce.description: True routes the finding back to verification (Wave 0: surfaces to Scott/Tom per DECISIONS.md D4).
